properties.name: HMNB Clyde (Faslane)
properties.rationale: Sole Royal Navy SSBN and SSN operating base. Single point of failure for UK deterrent at sea. Airburst to destroy submarines in port and base infrastructure.
properties.notes: Multi-warhead strike likely. Also cat E (naval base).

properties.name: RNAD Coulport
properties.rationale: Strategic warhead storage and torpedo loading for Trident submarines. 8 miles from Faslane.

properties.name: AWE Aldermaston
properties.rationale: UK nuclear warhead design, plutonium processing, tritium. Sprawling above-ground campus — airburst sufficient.

properties.name: AWE Burghfield
properties.rationale: UK warhead final assembly and dismantling. Sole site for this function. Soft industrial target.

properties.name: HMNB Devonport
properties.rationale: Largest naval base in Western Europe. Only UK facility able to refit nuclear submarines. Airburst to destroy drydocks and ships in refit.
properties.notes: Also cat E (naval base). Adjacent Plymouth city (I37).

properties.name: BAE Systems Barrow-in-Furness
properties.rationale: Sole UK shipyard building nuclear submarines (Astute-class SSN, Dreadnought-class SSBN). Irreplaceable industrial capability. Soft industrial site — airburst sufficient.

properties.name: Rolls-Royce Raynesway, Derby
properties.rationale: Only UK facility producing naval nuclear reactor cores (PWR2/PWR3). Sole-source supplier for SSN/SSBN propulsion. Soft industrial site.
properties.notes: Also cat H. Adjacent Derby city (I20).

properties.name: RAF Lakenheath
properties.rationale: 48th FW: F-35As joining F-15Es. Reportedly hosting B61-12 gravity bombs from 2024. Largest USAF combat base in Europe.

properties.name: RAF Fylingdales
properties.rationale: Solid-state phased array radar (SSPARS). Part of US Ballistic Missile Early Warning System and Space Surveillance Network.
properties.notes: Also cat G. Hardened structure — groundburst.

properties.name: RAF Menwith Hill
properties.rationale: Largest NSA station outside the US. 30+ radomes. ECHELON/FIVE EYES overhead SIGINT processing hub. SIGINT, not directly nuclear forces.

properties.name: Northwood HQ
properties.rationale: UK Permanent Joint Headquarters (all UK joint ops) and NATO Maritime Command. Global military command node.

properties.name: GCHQ Cheltenham
properties.rationale: GCHQ Doughnut. UK signals intelligence and cyber HQ. Five Eyes keystone. Modern above-ground office complex — airburst sufficient.

properties.name: RAF High Wycombe (Air Command HQ)
properties.rationale: HQ Air Command. Command and control of all RAF operational forces. Underground operations centre.

properties.name: PINDAR / Whitehall (Cabinet Office)
properties.rationale: Cabinet Office crisis management centre under MoD Main Building. Part of 3-GZ London strike. COBR/COBRA crisis management.

properties.name: Credenhill (22 SAS / UKSF HQ)
properties.rationale: HQ 22 SAS Regiment and UK Special Forces since 1999. UKSF operational base and strategic reserve capability.

properties.name: MI5 Thames House
properties.rationale: MI5 headquarters, Millbank. Internal security decapitation.

properties.name: MI6 Vauxhall Cross
properties.rationale: MI6 / SIS headquarters. Foreign intelligence decapitation.

properties.name: Sellafield
properties.rationale: Magnox reprocessing, THORP, ~140 tonnes Pu stored, high-level waste tanks, legacy ponds. Single most radiologically hazardous target in the UK. Groundburst to contaminate site and deny access.
properties.notes: Arguably strategic counterforce-level target due to Pu inventory.

properties.name: St Fergus Gas Terminal
properties.rationale: ~40% of UK gas lands here via North Sea and Norwegian Vesterled pipeline. Destroying it collapses UK gas supply. Strategic energy chokepoint.

properties.name: Widemouth Bay cable landing (Cornwall)
properties.rationale: Primary UK transatlantic cable bundle: TAT-14, Apollo North, Yellow, FLAG Atlantic, AEConnect. Severs most UK-US fibre capacity.

properties.name: HMNB Portsmouth
properties.rationale: Home port of QE-class carriers, Type 45 destroyers, Type 23/26 frigates. Airburst to destroy ships in port and dockyard infrastructure.
properties.notes: Also cat C (Navy Command nearby) and cat I (Portsmouth city I38).

properties.name: RAF Coningsby
properties.rationale: Quick Reaction Alert (South). Multiple Typhoon squadrons. Battle of Britain Memorial Flight.

properties.name: RAF Lossiemouth
properties.rationale: QRA (Interceptor) North. All UK P-8A Poseidon maritime patrol aircraft. Covers GIUK gap ASW.

properties.name: RAF Marham
properties.rationale: 617 Sqn and 207 OCU F-35B Lightning. UK's principal strike aircraft base.

properties.name: RAF Waddington
properties.rationale: RC-135W Rivet Joint SIGINT, Sentinel R1, Shadow R2, Protector RG1 RPAS. All UK airborne intelligence assets.

properties.name: RAF Brize Norton
properties.rationale: UK strategic air transport hub. Voyager tanker, C-17, A400M Atlas. Sole air bridge for power projection.

properties.name: RAF Odiham
properties.rationale: Sole Chinook HC6/6A operating base. Critical heavy helicopter lift for land forces.

properties.name: RAF Mildenhall
properties.rationale: 100th ARW (KC-135 tankers) and 352nd SOW (special operations). 7 miles from Lakenheath.

properties.name: RAF Croughton
properties.rationale: USAF 422nd ABG. Major satellite relay hub linking European and CONUS command networks. NSA presence.

properties.name: RAF Welford
properties.rationale: Largest USAF conventional munitions storage site in Europe. 100+ earth-covered bunkers. Nuclear weapons stored in WS3 vaults at operating bases, not here.

properties.name: RAF Fairford
properties.rationale: Forward operating location for US strategic bombers (B-52, B-2, B-1B). Routine rotations. Longest military runway in UK. Soft airfield target.

properties.name: RAF Alconbury
properties.rationale: 501st CSW. Co-located with Joint Analysis Center Molesworth. USAF intelligence fusion for EUCOM/AFRICOM.
properties.notes: Effectively same complex as B08 Molesworth.

properties.name: RAF Molesworth
properties.rationale: Joint Analysis Center — primary USAF intelligence facility in UK. 3 miles west of Alconbury.

properties.name: RAF Feltwell
properties.rationale: 5th Space Surveillance Squadron optical telescope site. Housing and support functions for Lakenheath/Mildenhall cluster.

properties.name: BAE Systems Warton
properties.rationale: Typhoon Eurofighter final assembly, F-35 rear fuselage production, GCAP/Tempest development. UK's principal combat aircraft plant.

properties.name: BAE Systems Samlesbury
properties.rationale: F-35B rear fuselage and Typhoon airframe structures. Sister site to Warton 12 miles away.

properties.name: BAE Systems Scotstoun
properties.rationale: Assembly of Type 26 City-class frigates (ASW hull). Adjacent to Govan.
properties.notes: Adjacent to H04 Govan on Clyde.

properties.name: BAE Systems Govan
properties.rationale: Hull block fabrication for Type 26 frigates. Paired operation with Scotstoun on the Clyde.

properties.name: MBDA Stevenage
properties.rationale: MBDA UK HQ and design centre. Meteor, Brimstone, CAMM/Sea Ceptor, SPEAR, legacy Storm Shadow. UK's primary missile design capability.

properties.name: Army HQ Andover (Marlborough Lines)
properties.rationale: HQ British Army at Marlborough Lines, Andover. Top-level army command.

properties.name: Navy Command Portsmouth (Portsdown Hill)
properties.rationale: HQ Navy Command on Portsdown Hill. Royal Navy operational command node.
properties.notes: Partially covered by HMNB Portsmouth strike (E01).

properties.name: RM Poole (SBS HQ)
properties.rationale: HQ Special Boat Service. UK maritime special forces base.

properties.name: GCHQ Bude (Morwenstow satellite station)
properties.rationale: GCHQ satellite intercept station. Adjacent to primary transatlantic cable landings (Widemouth Bay). Taps both satellite and undersea fibre.

properties.name: GCHQ Scarborough (Irton Moor)
properties.rationale: HF direction-finding and SIGINT station. Part of GCHQ's regional collection network.

properties.name: RNAS Yeovilton
properties.rationale: Wildcat HMA2 maritime attack and Commando Helicopter Force (Merlin Mk4). RM aviation.

properties.name: RNAS Culdrose
properties.rationale: Merlin HM2 ASW and Crowsnest AEW helicopters. Largest helicopter base in Europe.

properties.name: HMS Collingwood (Fareham)
properties.rationale: Maritime Warfare School and weapons engineering. Largest Royal Navy training establishment.

properties.name: RNAD Gosport (Frater/Bedenham)
properties.rationale: Royal Naval Armament Depot. Surface fleet munitions storage. Groundburst to destroy ordnance.

properties.name: DM Glen Douglas
properties.rationale: Defence Munitions Glen Douglas. Largest conventional munitions depot in Western Europe. NATO-tasked.

properties.name: Babcock Rosyth Dockyard
properties.rationale: QE-class carrier assembly site (complete ship assembly here). Ongoing RN surface vessel refit.

properties.name: HMS Raleigh (Torpoint)
properties.rationale: Initial naval training for all ratings. Adjacent to Devonport — probably covered by that strike.
properties.notes: Likely covered by A05 Devonport strike.

properties.name: BUTEC Kyle of Lochalsh
properties.rationale: British Underwater Test and Evaluation Centre. Torpedo and sonar testing range in sea loch.

properties.name: RAF Benson
properties.rationale: Puma HC2 squadrons. Medium helicopter lift and JHC support.

properties.name: RAF Wittering
properties.rationale: A4 Force HQ. RAF logistics, engineering and force development hub.

properties.name: RAF Northolt
properties.rationale: 32 (The Royal) Sqn VIP transport. London CASEVAC. RAF presence in London outskirts.

properties.name: RAF Leeming
properties.rationale: 100 Sqn Hawk T1 aggressor/training. 2 MASU. Northern England RAF support hub.

properties.name: RAF Valley
properties.rationale: 4 FTS Hawk T2. All UK fast-jet pilots train here. Destruction ends pipeline of combat pilots.

properties.name: RAF Cranwell
properties.rationale: RAF College Cranwell. Basic flying training, officer cadet training. RAF's principal training establishment.

properties.name: RAF Shawbury
properties.rationale: Defence Helicopter Flying School. All three services train rotary-wing pilots here.

properties.name: RAF Boulmer
properties.rationale: Air Surveillance and Control System CRC. Fuses UK radar picture for air defence.

properties.name: Catterick Garrison
properties.rationale: Largest British Army garrison. Multiple brigades including 1st (UK) Armoured Infantry. Infantry Training Centre.

properties.name: Aldershot Garrison
properties.rationale: Historic Home of the British Army. Garrison HQ, Army training facilities. Paras relocated to Colchester.

properties.name: Tidworth Garrison
properties.rationale: Tidworth/Bulford/Larkhill complex. 3 (UK) Division armoured brigades. Salisbury Plain training area.
properties.notes: Tidworth, Bulford, Larkhill all in same strike area.

properties.name: Colchester Garrison (Merville Bks)
properties.rationale: Home of 16 Air Assault Brigade — UK's high-readiness rapid reaction force (2 PARA, 3 PARA etc).

properties.name: Edinburgh Garrison (Redford/Dreghorn)
properties.rationale: Redford and Dreghorn barracks. Army presence in Edinburgh.

properties.name: RMA Sandhurst
properties.rationale: Royal Military Academy Sandhurst. Training all British Army officers — destruction severs pipeline.

properties.name: Infantry Training Centre Pirbright
properties.rationale: Phase 1 infantry training. Principal basic training establishment for infantry soldiers.

properties.name: Thiepval Bks, Lisburn (HQ 38 Bde)
properties.rationale: Thiepval Barracks, Lisburn. HQ 38 (Irish) Brigade. Army HQ for Northern Ireland.

properties.name: RRH Saxa Vord (Unst, Shetland)
properties.rationale: Northernmost UK radar. Air surveillance over Norwegian Sea and GIUK gap. Recently reactivated 2023.

properties.name: RRH Benbecula
properties.rationale: Remote Radar Head, Outer Hebrides. Western approaches air defence coverage.

properties.name: RRH Buchan
properties.rationale: Remote Radar Head Buchan. Scottish east coast air surveillance. Former Master Diversion Airfield.

properties.name: RRH Brizlee Wood
properties.rationale: Remote Radar Head. NE England coastal air surveillance.

properties.name: RRH Staxton Wold
properties.rationale: Remote Radar Head, Yorkshire coast. Oldest continually operated radar site in UK.

properties.name: Fawley Refinery
properties.rationale: ExxonMobil Fawley. Largest UK refinery, ~20% capacity. Feeds South England, Heathrow jet fuel. Adjacent Southampton.

properties.name: Stanlow Refinery
properties.rationale: EET Fuels (ex-Essar) Stanlow, Cheshire. Second largest UK refinery. Feeds NW England.

properties.name: Grangemouth Refinery / Petrochemicals
properties.rationale: Petroineos Grangemouth. Scotland's only refinery (transitioning 2025+). Only ethylene cracker in Scotland.
properties.notes: Status in transition — may close as refinery.

properties.name: South Hook LNG (Milford Haven)
properties.rationale: QatarEnergy/ExxonMobil. Largest UK LNG import terminal. Critical winter peak-shaving capacity.

properties.name: Isle of Grain LNG (Kent)
properties.rationale: National Gas Grain LNG — largest UK LNG storage by volume. Thames Estuary. IFA interconnector nearby.

properties.name: Drax Power Station (N Yorks)
properties.rationale: Drax — UK's largest power station by capacity (~3.9 GW). ~6% of UK electricity. Biomass + CCS.

properties.name: Capenhurst (Urenco UK)
properties.rationale: Urenco UK centrifuge enrichment plant. Sole UK uranium enrichment capability. Also stores depleted uranium.

properties.name: Hinkley Point C (Somerset)
properties.rationale: EDF Hinkley Point C EPR under construction (~7% future UK electricity). Groundburst to contaminate and prevent completion.

properties.name: Sizewell B + C (Suffolk)
properties.rationale: Sizewell B PWR (active) + Sizewell C planned. ~3% of current UK electricity.

properties.name: Heysham 1 + 2 (Lancashire)
properties.rationale: Two active AGR stations. UK's largest nuclear generating site. ~10% of national nuclear capacity.

properties.name: Hartlepool AGR
properties.rationale: Active AGR station on Teesside. Contributing to grid.

properties.name: Torness AGR (East Lothian)
properties.rationale: Active AGR station south-east of Edinburgh. Scotland's only currently active nuclear power plant.

properties.name: Pembroke Refinery (Valero)
properties.rationale: Valero Pembroke, Wales. ~10 million tpa. One of largest European refineries.

properties.name: Lindsey Oil Refinery (Humber)
properties.rationale: Prax Group, North Lincolnshire. Humber refinery complex.

properties.name: Bacton Gas Terminal (Norfolk)
properties.rationale: North Sea gas plus BBL (NL) and IUK (BE) interconnectors. Second key gas entry point for UK.

properties.name: Easington Gas Terminal (E Yorks)
properties.rationale: Langeled pipeline from Norway terminates here (~20% of UK gas). East Yorkshire coast.

properties.name: Sellindge / Folkestone (IFA HVDC)
properties.rationale: IFA and IFA2 UK converter stations. 2 GW to France. Destroying severs major import/export link.

properties.name: National Grid ESO Control Centre (Wokingham)
properties.rationale: National Grid Electricity System Operator main control centre. UK transmission system operation.

properties.name: Port of Felixstowe
properties.rationale: Britain's busiest container port. ~40% of UK container trade. Hutchison Ports.

properties.name: London Gateway
properties.rationale: DP World London Gateway. Deep-water container port on Thames. Adjacent data centre park.

properties.name: Liverpool / Birkenhead (Mersey Docks)
properties.rationale: Mersey Docks container terminal at Seaforth. Main Atlantic container port for NW England.
properties.notes: Covered partly by Liverpool city strike (I07).

properties.name: Port of Immingham
properties.rationale: Largest UK port by tonnage. Oil, coal, bulk cargo. Drax biomass imports.

properties.name: Slough data centre cluster
properties.rationale: Slough Trading Estate: Equinix LD4/LD5/LD6/LD8, Virtus, Digital Realty, Ark. Densest data centre cluster in Europe. AWS, Azure, Google, Oracle European points of presence.

properties.name: Docklands DC cluster (London)
properties.rationale: Telehouse North/East/West, Equinix LD1-3. LINX core. London main internet interconnect.

properties.name: Telehouse / LINX Docklands
properties.rationale: LINX (London Internet Exchange) primary site at Telehouse North. UK internet traffic interchange. Covered by London GZ 1.

properties.name: Oxwich Bay cable landing (S Wales)
properties.rationale: Amitie, 2Africa and other major cables landing S Wales coast. Growing strategic importance.

properties.name: Goonhilly Earth Station (Cornwall)
properties.rationale: Major satellite uplink facility (GEO, MEO, deep space). Adjacent undersea cable landings at Porthcurno.

properties.name: QinetiQ Boscombe Down
properties.rationale: UK Military Flying Test and Evaluation centre. Empire Test Pilots School. All UK military aircraft cleared here.

properties.name: DSTL Porton Down
properties.rationale: Defence Science and Technology Laboratory. Chemical and biological defence research. Historic significance.

properties.name: Thales UK Glasgow (Linthouse)
properties.rationale: Thales UK. Sonar suites for RN submarines, optronic mast systems, ship radar.

properties.name: MBDA Lostock (Bolton)
properties.rationale: MBDA production facility. CAMM/Sea Ceptor manufacture.

properties.name: Leonardo UK Edinburgh (Crewe Toll)
properties.rationale: Captor-E/M radar (Typhoon/F-35), Osprey AESA, DAS systems. Sole UK airborne radar OEM.

properties.name: Leonardo UK Luton
properties.rationale: Defensive Aids Sub-System, laser warning, EW systems for UK combat aircraft.

properties.name: QinetiQ Farnborough
properties.rationale: QinetiQ HQ. Historic RAE site. Wide-spectrum defence R&D.

properties.name: QinetiQ Portsdown Technology Park
properties.rationale: Maritime sensor systems, underwater weapons research. Portsdown West site.
properties.notes: Portsmouth area — overlap with HMNB strike.

properties.name: QinetiQ Aberporth
properties.rationale: West Wales test range. Air-to-surface and air-to-ground weapons qualification, UAV trials.

properties.name: Rolls-Royce Sinfin, Derby
properties.rationale: Rolls-Royce aero engine manufacture (EJ200 for Typhoon). Derby — overlap with Raynesway (A07) and Derby city (I20).

properties.name: RRH Portreath
properties.rationale: Remote Radar Head. South-west approaches air coverage.

properties.name: DIS Chicksands
properties.rationale: Defence Intelligence Security Centre / DISC. Former NSA/GCHQ Chicksands site. Military intelligence training.

properties.name: RAF Spadeadam
properties.rationale: Largest electronic warfare tactics range in Europe. EW training for NATO fast jets.

properties.name: Port of Dover
properties.rationale: ~40% of UK ro-ro freight with the continent. Cross-Channel chokepoint.

properties.name: Milford Haven
properties.rationale: UK's 2nd largest port by tonnage. South Hook and Dragon LNG terminals. Valero refinery.

properties.name: Port of Tilbury
properties.rationale: Port of Tilbury. London's primary grain and bulk port. ro-ro and container.

properties.name: Port of Grimsby
properties.rationale: Humber estuary. Adjacent to Immingham. Ro-ro and bulk.

properties.name: Belfast Harbour
properties.rationale: Main Northern Ireland port. Harland and Wolff adjacent (Spirit Aero/H&W repair).

properties.name: Dinorwig (Llanberis, N Wales)
properties.rationale: Electric Mountain pumped storage, 1.7 GW. Critical for grid frequency stability during peak demand.

properties.name: Cruachan (Argyll)
properties.rationale: Hollow Mountain pumped storage, 440 MW. Scottish grid stability.

properties.name: Richborough (Nemo Link)
properties.rationale: Nemo Link 1 GW HVDC converter station at Richborough, Kent. UK-Belgium.

properties.name: Bicker Fen (Viking Link)
properties.rationale: Viking Link 1.4 GW HVDC converter station near Boston, Lincs. UK-Denmark.

properties.name: Iron Acton 400kV Substation
properties.rationale: Major 400 kV super-grid node, South Gloucestershire. SW England grid hub.

properties.name: Farnborough / Fleet DC cluster (Ark Zeta)
properties.rationale: Ark Data Centres Farnborough Zeta / Leap DC. Major public-sector and defence-adjacent cloud hosting.

properties.name: Highbridge / Brean (Somerset)
properties.rationale: TAT-14 Bristol Channel landing point at Brean. Secondary transatlantic route.

properties.name: Lowestoft cable landing (Suffolk)
properties.rationale: Scandinavian and North Sea cable landings. East Anglia coast.

properties.name: Winterton-on-Sea cable landing (Norfolk)
properties.rationale: Pan-European and North Sea cable landings, Norfolk coast.

properties.name: Holyhead cable landing (Anglesey)
properties.rationale: Cable landing connecting UK-Ireland. Severs critical cross-Irish Sea links.

properties.name: Scrabster / Thurso cable landing (Caithness)
properties.rationale: Far-north cable landings connecting UK-Iceland-Faroes-Scandinavia.

properties.name: Park Royal DC cluster (West London)
properties.rationale: West London DC cluster: Global Switch Park Royal, Pulsant. London overspill capacity.

properties.name: Equinix Manchester MA1+
properties.rationale: Equinix Manchester data centre cluster. Primary cloud on-ramp for NW England.

properties.name: NGD Newport / Vantage (S Wales)
properties.rationale: Next Generation Data / Vantage Newport. One of Europe's largest single-site data centres. AWS, UK Gov data.

properties.name: STACK Infrastructure (West Drayton / Hayes)
properties.rationale: Large west London hyperscale campus. Near Heathrow. Major cloud anchor.

properties.name: Dragon LNG (Milford Haven)
properties.rationale: Second Milford Haven LNG terminal. Shell/Ancala. Adjacent to South Hook.

properties.name: Sullom Voe Oil Terminal (Shetland)
properties.rationale: North Sea and West of Shetland oil terminal. BP-operated. Critical to N Sea production.

properties.name: Flotta Oil Terminal (Orkney)
properties.rationale: Repsol/Repsol Sinopec oil terminal, Orkney. Piper/Claymore/Flotta field output.

properties.name: Dungeness B (Kent)
properties.rationale: AGR in defuelling phase. Spent fuel on site — contamination risk.

properties.name: Bradwell (Essex)
properties.rationale: Magnox decommissioning, Essex coast. Spent fuel in interim storage.

properties.name: Trawsfynydd (N Wales)
properties.rationale: Magnox decommissioning. Proposed SMR candidate site. Radioactive inventory on site.

properties.name: Chapelcross (Dumfriesshire)
properties.rationale: Former Magnox. Historically produced tritium for nuclear weapons. Decommissioning.

properties.name: Dounreay (Caithness)
properties.rationale: Historic fast-reactor site. Significant radioactive inventory in decommissioning. Remote but significant.

properties.name: Wylfa (Anglesey)
properties.rationale: Wylfa Magnox decommissioning and 400 kV super-grid substation. Future large-scale nuclear candidate site.

properties.name: Greenock / Clydeport
properties.rationale: Clydeport Greenock Ocean Terminal. Container and cruise. Clyde approaches.

properties.name: Scottish Parliament, Holyrood
properties.rationale: Scottish Parliament and government. Political decapitation of Scotland.

properties.name: Senedd / Senedd Cymru, Cardiff
properties.rationale: Welsh Parliament and government. Political decapitation of Wales.

properties.name: Stormont, Belfast
properties.rationale: Northern Ireland Assembly and Executive. Political decapitation of Northern Ireland.

properties.name: London — City / East
properties.rationale: City of London financial district, Bank of England, Docklands data centres. GZ 1 of 3 for London.
properties.notes: Multi-GZ pattern with I02 and I03.

properties.name: London — Westminster / Whitehall
properties.rationale: Parliament, Whitehall, Downing St, MoD, PINDAR, MI5, MI6. GZ 2 of 3 for London. Decapitates UK government.

properties.name: London — West / Slough corridor
properties.rationale: West London industrial + transport + Slough data centre cluster. GZ 3 of 3 for London.
properties.notes: Covers O01 (Slough DCs) and Heathrow (P01) on periphery.

properties.name: Birmingham
properties.rationale: 2nd largest UK city (~1.15M). Midlands industrial and commercial heartland.

properties.name: Manchester
properties.rationale: Greater Manchester ~2.9M. NW England economic hub. Major logistics, tech and media centre.

properties.name: Glasgow
properties.rationale: Greater Glasgow ~1.85M. Scotland's largest urban area. Naval shipbuilding on the Clyde.

properties.name: Liverpool
properties.rationale: Merseyside ~1.4M. Major Atlantic port and container terminal. Regional industrial hub.

properties.name: Leeds
properties.rationale: West Yorkshire financial and commercial centre. ~800k city, ~1.8M metro.

properties.name: Sheffield
properties.rationale: Historic steel and engineering city. Advanced manufacturing cluster. Pop ~580k.

properties.name: Bristol
properties.rationale: Aerospace industry (Airbus Filton, GKN). Port of Bristol. Pop ~470k.

properties.name: Newcastle upon Tyne
properties.rationale: Tyneside conurbation ~780k. NE regional capital.

properties.name: Edinburgh
properties.rationale: Scotland's capital. Financial services hub. ~510k city. Scottish Parliament (C12) nearby.
properties.notes: Covers C12 Holyrood and H08 Leonardo.

properties.name: Cardiff
properties.rationale: Capital of Wales. Administrative and commercial centre. ~365k city.

properties.name: Belfast
properties.rationale: Capital of Northern Ireland. Aerospace industry (Spirit Aero, former Short Brothers). ~345k.

properties.name: Nottingham
properties.rationale: East Midlands regional centre. ~330k city. Pharmaceutical manufacturing.

properties.name: Southampton
properties.rationale: South coast port — container, cruise and ro-ro. Pop ~270k. Adjacent Fawley refinery.

properties.name: Portsmouth
properties.rationale: Royal Navy HQ city. Pop ~215k. Probably covered by HMNB Portsmouth strike.

properties.name: Plymouth
properties.rationale: UK's largest naval city. Pop ~264k. Largely covered by HMNB Devonport strike.

properties.name: Leicester
properties.rationale: East Midlands manufacturing and commercial city. Pop ~370k.

properties.name: Coventry
properties.rationale: West Midlands automotive and engineering. Pop ~345k. Rebuilt after WWII blitz.

properties.name: Stoke-on-Trent
properties.rationale: Midlands industrial city. Pop ~260k.

properties.name: Wolverhampton
properties.rationale: West Midlands industrial city. Pop ~260k. Engineering and manufacturing.

properties.name: Derby
properties.rationale: Rolls-Royce HQ, Toyota, Bombardier trains. Pop ~260k. Overlap with A07 Raynesway.

properties.name: Reading
properties.rationale: Thames Valley tech corridor HQ cluster. Pop ~320k. 10 miles from AWE Aldermaston.

properties.name: Milton Keynes
properties.rationale: New city, logistics hub. Pop ~290k. Strategic road junction (M1/A5).

properties.name: Cambridge
properties.rationale: Cambridge science and biotech cluster. ARM Holdings, AstraZeneca, Mott MacDonald. Pop ~145k.

properties.name: Oxford
properties.rationale: University and tech cluster. BMW MINI plant. Pop ~160k.

properties.name: Swansea
properties.rationale: South Wales industrial and port city. Pop ~240k.

properties.name: Aberdeen
properties.rationale: North Sea oil and gas industry hub. Port and logistics. Pop ~200k.

properties.name: Dundee
properties.rationale: Scottish east coast city. Tech sector (video games — Rockstar/DC Thompson), biomedical. Pop ~150k.

properties.name: Kingston upon Hull
properties.rationale: Humber estuary port city. Siemens wind turbine manufacture. Pop ~260k.

properties.name: Middlesbrough / Teesside
properties.rationale: Teesside industrial conurbation. Steel, chemicals, Wilton industrial complex. ~300k area.

properties.name: Sunderland
properties.rationale: NE port city. Nissan UK car plant — largest single car factory in UK. Pop ~275k.

properties.name: Preston
properties.rationale: Lancashire city. Near BAE Warton (H01) and Samlesbury (H02). Pop ~140k.

properties.name: Brighton and Hove
properties.rationale: South coast. ~280k. University city, secondary commuter city for London.

properties.name: Bournemouth / Poole
properties.rationale: South coast conurbation ~470k including Christchurch. SBS HQ at Poole (C11).

properties.name: Norwich
properties.rationale: East Anglia regional centre. ~145k. Insurance/financial sector.

properties.name: York
properties.rationale: North Yorkshire. ~210k. Railway engineering (National Railway Museum, train maintenance).

properties.name: Peterborough
properties.rationale: Eastern England logistics hub. ~215k. A1/East Coast Main Line junction.

properties.name: London Heathrow (LHR)
properties.rationale: UK's primary international hub. ~80M pax/year. Strategic airlift capability. Jet fuel depot.

properties.name: London Gatwick (LGW)
properties.rationale: 2nd London airport. ~45M pax. Backup international routing.

properties.name: East Midlands Airport (EMA)
properties.rationale: UK's largest pure-cargo airport (DHL, UPS, Royal Mail). Strategic logistics vulnerability.

properties.name: Manchester Airport (MAN)
properties.rationale: Primary airport for N England and Scotland. ~28M pax. Adjacent to Manchester.

properties.name: Prestwick Airport (PIK)
properties.rationale: NATO designated diversion airfield. USAF transatlantic transit hub. Historically: Cold War strategic use.

properties.name: Edinburgh Airport (EDI)
properties.rationale: Busiest Scottish airport. Adjacent to Edinburgh city.
